final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [4:0] count
);
    
    initial begin
        count = 5'b00001; // Initialize the counter
    end

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 5'b00001; // Reset to '00001'
        end else begin
            count <= {count[3:0], count[4]}; // Shift left
        end
    end
endmodule
